strategy: Team fight (15,615 health, two Gators). Enter on time: joining late strips 90% of your max health and drops Doom and Gloom on you.
Round 1 he nukes everyone for 90% of max health and casts Doom and Gloom, so you start near death. Survive it, then heal up before setting up.
Doom and Gloom cuts your healing, so use big or stacked heals to recover from the round-1 nuke.
Every third round he shaves 5% max health off everyone and casts Mass Infection. Carry Cleanse Charm to clear the infection before your hit.
He is only boosted +3% by Fire and Myth and resists everything 47%, so bring your strongest reliable hitter and blade once the team is stable.
Funnel blades to the hitter and burst the boss and Gators together with an AoE.
cheatNotes: Joining late strips 90% of your max health and recasts Doom and Gloom on you.
Round 1 he casts Doom and Gloom and a 6-pip Moon spell that removes 90% max health from every wizard.
Every third round he removes another 5% max health from all wizards and casts Mass Infection.
